title: Frustrated i can't comment on my videos

transcript.text: Yo, what's up? I just wanted to make a video saying that I'm frustrated, that I can't comment on my own videos.
It happens a lot.
Maybe like a good 20% of the time, I can't comment on my own videos.
And like, I made a video the other day, or months ago, saying how America is the best country in the world.
So, and then the last couple days, I've been getting like people, one person in particular, saying, you know, arguing with me on it.
And then they're arguing with me on these other videos I make, and I literally, and I can't comment.
And like, so I was like, and the problem is like, you know, you have 300 characters to comment, which takes a little while to do,
Because you have to figure out what you're going to say in a good way to fill up that 300.
And then, and then you click, hit, click, post, and it can't post.
So then you copy it, and then you waste all of this time shutting down Explorer, opening it up again,
Going back into the website, finding your video, and then commenting, and you can't comment.
And then, and then they've sent another comment.
So there's all these other people commenting on your videos, and then you can't, and so then you try it on the other computer.
But you can't comment on that computer either.
So then the next day comes.
And then like, this happened yesterday, and I try it again.
I'm like, all right, I'm going to comment, I'm going to comment.
And I commented, and it went through.
And so then the same person comments back all these different comments.
And then I try to comment, and I can't comment.
So it's like, really frustrating, because I'm not one of these people who uploads videos talking about stuff,
And then doesn't answer their videos.
And there's lots of people like that, because I comment on a lot of people's, on people's videos,
And they never answer me, pretty much never.
Like, 1% of the time will they answer my comments.
So people don't do that.
But I do.
But I can't.
It pisses me off.
I want to be able to comment on my videos.
That's half the reason, half the joy of making videos on YouTube is arguing people afterwards.
And, um, but I can't.
And I don't know what the deal is.
Like, why?
Is it, you, it's, it's, it's gotta be on YouTube site.
Because neither of my computers would do it.
Um, but other people's video sites can do it.
So, like, is this some kind of, like, phantasmal, like, uh, miraculous, uh, like, thing that it just naturally happens
Because it's just computers?
Or is it, like, is it, it's some kind of conspiracy against me?
Is it, like, the demons, the spirits coming in?
And, like, what the fuck's going on?
It's really weird, man.
Because I don't, like, I don't want people to come in.
I mean, not like I care that much about what people think about me.
But I don't, like, I don't want people to come in and see my video of talking stuff that's really provocative.
And then, and then reading below all these people insulting me.
And then there's no comment from me defending myself about it.
It's like, because then it makes me look stupid.
It makes me look like I don't care.
It makes me look, you know, like I'm rolling over or something.
And, uh, or, like, I'm lazy or something like that.
And, uh, and it's just really annoying.
So, I just wanted to make a YouTube video about it because it has, it has, it has to do with YouTube.
And it's like, does that happen to you too?
Because I know other people have trouble commenting on my videos because I've had people complain about it.
Be like, why are you blocking your comments?
And I'm like, I'm not.
So, like, does that happen?
Like, do you have problems commenting on your own videos?
So, there you go.
That's that.
